name: rateloop
description: Use RateLoop for human assurance of public, synthetic, or redacted AI-enabled workflows.

interface.longDescription: RateLoop gives Codex a privacy-bounded workflow for preparing human review of public, synthetic, or redacted AI-enabled work. The user approves the exact payload before a tokenless browser handoff is created, reviews the ask in the browser, and can return later for status and auditable results.
defaultPrompt: Prepare human assurance for this public AI workflow
Review this redacted output with a human panel
Check the status of my RateLoop assurance handoff
